note: retail KB fully updated (8 files) with 2026-07-04 data. KEY FINDS: MARKET: Agentic AI in Retail $60.43B (2026) CAGR 29.29% -> $218.37B (2031). McKinsey: $1T US agentic commerce by 2030, $3-5T globally. Global retail ecommerce $7.4T+. Voice-Commerce Agents fastest-growing: 36.25% CAGR. Generative Dialogue: 45.80% market share. North America 37.35% share; APAC 34.88% CAGR (unmanned stores). 88% retailers use AI regularly (McKinsey). TOP AGENTS (Apache/MIT): Gorse (gorse-io/gorse, Apache-2.0, 9.6k stars, self-hosted recommender, LLM ranker). NVIDIA Retail-Catalog-Enrichment (Apache-2.0, 1k+ stars, VLM catalog enrichment). Microsoft Recommenders (MIT, 18k+ stars, 30+ algos). NeuralForecast (Nixtla, Apache-2.0, 3.5k stars, <8% MAPE on M5). Rasa CALM (Apache-2.0, 19k stars, on-prem chatbot for LGPD/GDPR). CrewAI (MIT, 55k stars). LangChain (MIT, 100k stars). TensorHouse (Apache-2.0, 1.4k stars, retail ML patterns DQN pricing). VERTICALS: Medusa (MIT, 30.9k stars, agent-native v3, fastest growing). Saleor (BSD-3, 22.2k stars, UCP+Perplexity Shopping). Odoo (LGPL, 40k+ stars, 12M users). ERPNext (GPL, 20k). Apache OFBiz (Apache-2.0, safest license). OSPOS (MIT, PHP POS). TRENDING: UCP (Google/Shopify, REST/JSON-RPC, AI agent commerce standard). Catalog enrichment as agentic commerce prerequisite. NVIDIA Multi-Agent Intelligent Warehouse blueprint. Voice commerce 36.25% CAGR. EU AI Act Aug 2026 chatbot transparency enforcement. COMPOSE PATTERNS (7): (1) Self-hosted recs: Gorse+Medusa+LangChain, 3-4w, 15-25% CTR up, 60-80% cost vs SaaS. (2) Demand forecasting+auto replenishment: NeuralForecast+StatsForecast+ERPNext+CrewAI, 5-7w. (3) Multimodal shopping assistant: NVIDIA blueprint+Saleor+Gorse, 6-8w. (4) Dynamic pricing: TensorHouse+Medusa+NeuralForecast+CrewAI, 4-6w, 3-8% margin improvement. (5) Autonomous inventory crew: CrewAI+Odoo/ERPNext+NeuralForecast, 4-6w. (6) AI Catalog Enrichment: NVIDIA Catalog Enrichment+Saleor/Medusa+Milvus+LangChain, 2-3w batch + 1w ongoing, 80% ops reduction. (7) On-prem chatbot LGPD/GDPR: Rasa CALM+ERPNext/Medusa+Milvus+Ollama Llama3.1, 4-6w, 60-70% tier-1 resolution. Next industry: travel (index 6).
